response.justification: Although the candidate meets the 15-year experience baseline and possesses entrepreneurial experience, their background is primarily in hands-on Senior and Staff full-stack development. They lack the Director-level strategic leadership, enterprise customer advisory experience, and recognized deep expertise in AI platforms required for this Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background as a founder of an open-source platform
Strong engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, and microservices
concerns: Lacks the required deep, recognized expertise in AI and ML strategy
Seniority mismatch, operating at Senior/Staff rather than Director-level IC
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers
